description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage. Add a test_tox job that runs in the python:3.6-alpine Docker image and executes the exact shell commands: apk add --update gcc musl-dev openssl libffi-dev libjpeg-turbo postgresql-dev git; pwd; ls -lah; which git; pip install tox codecov; tox; codecov -e $CODECOV_TOKEN. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
